jobs.title: FP&A Manager
jobs.content: <p><strong>FP&A Manager</strong></p><p>Iterable is the cross-channel marketing-automation platform pioneered around the customer-data-and-engagement-hub data model & the cross-channel-customer-engagement segment.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer (Cloud Platform)
jobs.content: <p>Lead Iterable's SRE function across the AI Suite / Studio / Journeys / Embedded Messaging platform.</p>
